description_long: This bungalow features a steeply pitched gable roof with dark brown shingles and a prominent front porch supported by two large pillars. The structure is primarily constructed from wood, with a mix of horizontal and vertical planks, and is surrounded by a low wooden fence and manicured hedges. The front yard includes a small green lawn and a stone pathway leading to the entrance, flanked by decorative lamp posts. The side and rear of the bungalow reveal an expansive wooden deck with railings, a small outdoor seating area, and a raised platform with a bed. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a large window on the rear and smaller ones on the front and sides. The overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman-style bungalow, blending rustic charm with functional outdoor spaces.
description: A wooden Craftsman-style bungalow with a steep gable roof, front porch, fenced yard, and an expansive rear deck. Features include decorative lamp posts, asymmetrical windows, and manicured hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steep gable roof, large porch with pillars, front lawn, stone path, and lamp posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wooden deck, fenced perimeter, and the raised platform with a bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large deck area, rear window, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, side entrance, and the arrangement of lamp posts and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
